The "One Night In Miami" Cast Plays Who's Who To celebrate the release of Regina King’s directorial debut, we had the cast of “One Night In Miami” — Leslie Odom Jr,. Eli Goree, Kingsley Ben-Adir, and Aldis Hodge — take a break from the serious drama and play a fun game of Who’s Who. So, who’s most likely to randomly start singing on set? Who’s best at doing impressions of their other cast members? Who’d win at a game of Regina King trivia? Only one way to find out! #OneNightInMiami #PrimeVideo #WhosWho - BuzzFeed
If You're A Soup Freak, You'll Have No Problem Identifying All 16 Of These Soups - BuzzFeed

The "Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist" Cast Finds Out Which Characters They Really Are “Zoey’s Extraordinary Playlist” recently became one of our favorite TV shows, so to celebrate Season 2 we had the cast — Jane Levy, Skylar Astin, John Clarence Stewart, Alex Newell, and Mary Steenburgen — take a quiz to find out which characters they actually are. Click on the video to watch Mary Steenburgen casually name drop Barbra Streisand, Skylar Astin do some singing, and much more! #ZoeysExtraordinaryPlaylist #BuzzFeedQuiz #ZoeysPlaylist - BuzzFeed

I Got Plastic Surgery And I Regret It When Cherry considered plastic surgery as a solution to her relationship problems, she could never have imagined the impact that choice would have on her family and future. Check out Cherry's youtube channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1mQtXSAn9AGOk2g2rkgVpQ Cherry's Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cherrytung.co/?hl=en - BuzzFeed

I Didn't Use Toothpaste For A Week Throughout quarantine, Joyce has seen several self-care, DIY trends that folks have been trying from home that she wants to put to the test. In this episode of Quarantine Hacks, Joyce throws out her Colgate and replaces it with a low-waste DIY toothpaste for 5 days. - BuzzFeed
